protocol=TCP

http=GET /index.html
headers={'Host': 'example.org', 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0'}
payload=GET /index.html HTTP/1.1
Host: example.org
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Length: 2

OK

traffic-06d60cdb.content:
pcap=/tmp/tmpl0j8qjwo.pcap
protocol=TCP
src=192.168.56.10:41006 dst=10.0.0.20:80
http=GET /search?q=<script>alert('xss')</script>
headers={'Host': 'vuln.local'}
payload=GET /search?q=<script>alert('xss')</script> HTTP/1.1
Host: vuln.local

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Length: 2

OK
traffic-06d60cdb.intent: 检测针对Web应用的反射型XSS攻击尝试，攻击者试图通过注入恶意脚本利用输入验证漏洞实现初始访问

rule-2024001.content: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET WEB_SERVER Reflected XSS Attempt via <script>alert Payload"; flow:established,to_server; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/search"; http_uri; content:"q="; http_uri; content:"<script>alert"; http_uri; fast_pattern; nocase; content:"xss"; http_uri; nocase; distance:0; within:50; pcre:"/\/search\?q=[^&]*<script[^>]*>alert\s*\(\s*['\"]xss['\"]\s*\)/i"; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2024001; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Server, created_at 2024_01_01, deployment Perimeter, signature_severity Major, tag Reflected_XSS, updated_at 2024_01_01;)
rule-2024001.intent: 检测通过HTTP GET请求中的查询参数发起的反射型XSS攻击，攻击者试图注入<script>alert('xss')等恶意脚本到Web服务器响应中。
keywords: ET WEB_SERVER Reflected XSS Attempt via <script>alert Payload

traffic-c7bac828.content:
pcap=sandbox_samples/attack/attack_cmd_inject.pcap
protocol=TCP
src=192.168.56.10:41008 dst=10.0.0.20:80
http=GET /ping?host=127.0.0.1;cat+/etc/passwd
headers={'Host': 'vuln.local'}
payload=GET /ping?host=127.0.0.1;cat+/etc/passwd HTTP/1.1
Host: vuln.local

HTTP/1.1 200 OK
Content-Length: 2

OK
traffic-c7bac828.intent: 检测通过HTTP参数注入执行系统命令的攻击行为，属于命令注入攻击

rule-2024002.content: alert tcp any any -> $HOME_NET any (msg:"ET WEB_SERVER Command Injection Attempt via HTTP Parameter with cat /etc/passwd"; flow:established,to_server; content:"GET"; http_method; content:"/ping"; http_uri; fast_pattern; content:"host="; http_uri; content:"cat"; http_uri; nocase; distance:0; within:50; content:"/etc/passwd"; http_uri; distance:0; within:50; pcre:"/host=[^&]*cat[^&]*\/etc\/passwd/i"; classtype:web-application-attack; sid:2024002; rev:1; metadata:attack_target Server, mitre_tactic_id TA0001, mitre_tactic_name Initial_Access, mitre_technique_id T1190, mitre_technique_name Exploit_Public-Facing_Application, mitre_tactic_id TA0009, mitre_tactic_name Collection, mitre_technique_id T1005, mitre_technique_name Data from Local System, mitre_tactic_id TA0002, mitre_tactic_name Execution, mitre_technique_id T1059, mitre_technique_name Command and Scripting Interpreter, deployment Perimeter, signature_severity Major, tag Command_Injection, created_at 2024_01_01;)
rule-2024002.intent: 检测通过HTTP参数进行命令注入的尝试，攻击者试图利用面向公众的Web应用程序漏洞执行系统命令并读取敏感文件，属于初始访问、执行和数据收集的复合攻击行为。
keywords: ET WEB_SERVER Command Injection Attempt via HTTP Parameter with cat /etc/passwd
